title: Quantitative real-time PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2gujl","text":"Quantitative real-time PCR protocol used for Day et al. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"a6vp5","text":"-SuperScript IV VILO Master Mix (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ksn","text":"-TaqMan PreAmp Master Mix (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7elnd","text":"-TaqMan Fast Advanced Master Mix (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f4tlj","text":"-UltraPure DNase/RNase-Free Distilled Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3bv81","text":"-TaqMan Gene Expression Assays: hprt Mm03024075_m1, Slc12a2(NKCC1) Mm01265955_m1,Slc12a5(KCC2)\nMm00803929_m1, Slc4a3 Mm00436654_g1, Slc4a10 Mm00473827_m1 (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dha3m","text":"-PCR tubes, PCR plates and film","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"66d85","text":"-Micropipettes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ah7ag","text":"-Aerosol-resistant barrier pipette tips","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: -For each sample prepare 10ul gDNA digestion reaction mix according to SuperScript IV VILO Master Mix protocol (see pdf attached or substeps below).
Add SuperScript IV VILO Master Mix and Nuclease-free water.
Gently mix and incubate at 25 °C for 00:10:00 .
Inactivate enzyme by incubation at 85 °C for 00:05:00 .
Perform Pre-amplification according to TaqMan PreAmp Master Mix protocol (see pdf attached or substeps below).
-TaqMan PreAmp Master Mix 25ul, pooled assay mix (0.2X) 12.5ul, cDNA 2ul, nuclease free water, total 50ul.
Run reaction settings: 95 °C for 00:10:00 then 95 °C for 00:00:15 , 60 °C for 00:04:00 (10 cycles), inactivate enzyme 99 °C for 00:10:00 , hold at 4 °C
-PCR reaction mix: Gene Expression Assay (20X) 1ul, Preamplified cDNA product 5ul, TaqMan Fast Advanced Master Mix (2X) 10ul, nuclease free water 4ul, total 20ul.
-Run the reactions: Using incubation 50 °C for 00:02:00 then enzyme activation- 95 °C for 00:00:20 , Denature 95 °C for 00:00:01 , Anneal/Extend 60 °C for 00:00:20 40 cycles.
Experimental Ct values were normalized to hprt values using the following formula: ΔCt = Ct (gene of interest) − Ct (hprt). The final expression levels were shown as ΔCt values.
creator: Christine Weber-Schmidt
